item.title: DOI's Investigation into the Reclamation of Vacant NYCHA Apartments

more

CHRISTOPHER RYAN ACTING COMMISSIONER 180 MAIDEN LANE Release #05-2026 NEW YORK, NY 10038 nyc.gov/doi 212-825-5900
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE CONTACT: DIANE STRUZZI TUESDAY, MARCH 3, 2026 CLODAGH MCGOWAN (212) 825-5931
DOI ISSUES REPORT ON THE PUBLIC SAFETY RISK INVOLVING VACANT APARTMENTS IN THE NYC PUBLIC HOUSING AUTHORITY (“NYCHA”) AND FIVE RECOMMENDATIONS TO MITIGATE THESE RISKS, WHICH NYCHA HAS ACCEPTED

item.title: Access Denied: Challenges to DOI's Oversight of the City's Child Welfare System
item.description:
more
The City of New York Department of Investigation
NADIA I. SHIHATA COMMISSIONER 180 MAIDEN LANE Release #10-2026 NEW YORK, NY 10038 nyc.gov/doi 212-825-5900
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE CONTACT: DIANE STRUZZI TUESDAY, MAY 5, 2026 CLODAGH MCGOWAN (212) 825-5931
DOI REPORT: ACCESS DENIED – CHALLENGES TO DOI’S OVERSIGHT OF THE CITY’S CHILD WELFARE SYSTEM
Nadia I. Shihata, Commissioner of the New York City Department of Investigation (DOI), issued a Report today on the…
